learn_subtitle: One step every day toward financial freedom
learn_streak_congrats: Congrats! Consistency is the key to success 💪
learn_did_you_know_msg: Lessons change daily and are customized to your financial stage. Every 7 days, there's an Islamic lesson related to provision.
learn_lesson_awareness_0_title: 🌱 The wealth journey starts with recording your first transaction
learn_lesson_awareness_0_body: Expense tracking reduces unconscious spending by 20%. Record today's expenses now.
learn_lesson_awareness_1_title: 💡 What is not measured is not improved
learn_lesson_awareness_1_body: Financial awareness is the first step to wealth. Add your income and expenses this month.
learn_lesson_awareness_2_body: Spending $5 a day = $1,825 a year. Small recurring expenses are the biggest enemy of wealth.
learn_lesson_awareness_3_body: 50% for necessities, 30% for wants, 20% for savings. These ratios are scientifically proven successful.
learn_lesson_awareness_4_title: 🎯 A written goal increases probability by 42%
learn_lesson_awareness_4_body: Writing financial goals increases the chance of achieving them. What is your financial goal for this year?
learn_lesson_debt_0_body: Start with the smallest debt to get immediate psychological motivation. Every debt you pay is a victory!
learn_lesson_debt_1_body: $10,000 debt at 20% interest = $23,000 total if you only pay the minimum!
learn_lesson_debt_2_title: ⚖️ The believer's soul is suspended by his debt
learn_lesson_debt_2_body: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'The soul of the believer is suspended by his debt until it is paid for him.' Who seeks to pay his debt with sincere intention, Allah will help him.
learn_lesson_debt_3_body: 'O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and grief, from incapacity and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being overpowered by debt and from being overpowered by men.' (Bukhari)
learn_lesson_debt_4_title: 💚 Whoever wants to pay, Allah will pay for him
learn_lesson_debt_4_body: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever takes people's money wanting to return it, Allah will pay it on his behalf.' Sincere intention attracts divine help.
learn_lesson_emergency_0_body: An emergency fund is not a luxury — it's the difference between a crisis and a disaster.
learn_lesson_emergency_1_body: Collect your essential monthly expenses × 3 if you are an employee, × 6 if you are a freelancer.
learn_lesson_emergency_2_body: Start saving 1% of your salary and raise it 1% every month. Gradual change is more effective.
learn_lesson_emergency_3_title: 🛡️ Wisdom of Joseph, peace be upon him
learn_lesson_emergency_3_body: 'You will plant for seven years as usual; and what you harvest, leave it in its ear' (Yusuf:47).
learn_lesson_investing_0_body: 72 ÷ Return Rate = Doubling Years. 8% return: your money doubles every 9 years.
learn_lesson_investing_1_body: The DJIM Islamic Index outperformed the S&P 500 in 7 of the last 10 years. SPUS is an excellent choice.
learn_lesson_investing_2_body: Harry Markowitz: 'Diversification is the only free lunch in investing.'
learn_lesson_investing_3_title: 🚫 Allah is Pure and accepts only what is pure
learn_lesson_investing_3_body: Haram money does not accept charity or prayer with it. Be keen on halal income sources.
learn_lesson_investing_4_body: Invest a fixed amount every month regardless of price. Consistency beats intelligence.
learn_lesson_wealth_0_body: 'True wealth is the ability to wake up on Monday morning and decide for yourself what to do.'
learn_lesson_wealth_1_title: 🌅 The Upper Hand is better than the Lower Hand
learn_lesson_wealth_1_body: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'The upper hand is better than the lower hand.' Your goal in building wealth is to always be the one with the upper hand.
learn_lesson_wealth_2_body: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'No wealth is diminished by charity.' Charity blesses wealth and does not decrease it.
learn_lesson_wealth_3_body: IRS study: The average millionaire has 7 sources of income. Start with a simple second source.
learn_lesson_wealth_4_body: Investing $1,000 in a professional skill returns 10x. Investing in yourself is the safest bet.
settings_assets_desc: Enter your personal asset values to calculate your true net worth.

Have you tried Fajrak? A free Arabic financial app that helps you control your expenses and build your wealth 🌅

settings_delete_account_warning: Please note that deleting your account will permanently delete all your financial data and this step cannot be undone.

onboarding_welcome_subtitle: Your companion on the road to financial freedom. Let's set up your profile.
onboarding_income_subtitle: This helps us calculate your budgets automatically.
onboarding_payday_subtitle: When do you usually receive your income?
onboarding_currency_subtitle: Choose your main currency for tracking.
help_contact_subtitle: Send us an email and we'll reply soon
help_faq_dashboard_a1: The dashboard is your home page - it shows a complete summary of your financial situation this month, including income, expenses, and net balance.
help_faq_dashboard_q2: How do I add a transaction quickly?
help_faq_dashboard_a2: Use the 'Quick Add' section at the top of the page. Select the category, enter the amount, and press add. It takes less than 5 seconds!
help_faq_dashboard_q3: What is the Financial Health Score?
help_faq_dashboard_a3: A number from 0-100 that measures your financial health based on 5 factors: savings, debt, emergency fund, investment, and tracking consistency.
help_faq_transactions_q1: How do I add an income or expense?
help_faq_transactions_a1: Go to the transactions page and press the + button at the top. Select the type (income/expense), enter the amount, category, and date, then press save.
help_faq_transactions_q2: How do I delete or edit a transaction?
help_faq_transactions_a2: Tap on the transaction to edit it, or swipe left on mobile to delete it.
help_faq_transactions_a3: Yes! Press the 'Export CSV' button on the transactions page and you'll get an Excel file with all your transactions.
help_faq_transactions_q4: Why was my recurring transaction recorded on the wrong date?
help_faq_transactions_a4: When creating a new recurring rule, 'Next Date' defaults to today. Make sure to manually change it to the correct date (e.g., the 25th) before saving. To fix an existing rule: open the 'Recurring' tab in Transactions, tap Edit, and update 'Next Date' to the correct future date.
help_faq_debts_q1: How do I add a new debt?
help_faq_debts_a1: Go to the debts page and press 'Add Debt'. Enter the debt name, original amount, remaining amount, and monthly installment.
help_faq_debts_a2: You can set a day of the month for each debt, and the app will automatically deduct the installment from your balance every month without your intervention.
help_faq_debts_q3: What happens when a debt is fully paid?
help_faq_debts_a3: 🎉 Celebration! Fireworks and congratulations will appear. The debt moves to the 'Paid Debts' list as a permanent achievement.
help_faq_debts_a4: The deduction happens on the payment day specified for each debt. If you set day 25, the installment is deducted on the 25th of every month. If the debt is added after the 25th, deduction starts from the following month.
help_faq_budget_q1: How does the Smart Budget work?
help_faq_budget_a1: The budget is automatically calculated from your data - your income minus installments and goals. The smart financial advisor analyzes it and gives you immediate recommendations.
help_faq_budget_a2: 50% of your income for necessities, 30% for wants, 20% for savings and investment. The app automatically distributes your budget with these percentages.
help_faq_goals_q1: How do I create a savings goal?
help_faq_goals_a1: Go to the goals page and press New Goal. Set the goal name, target amount, and required date.
help_faq_goals_q2: How do I add an amount to my goal?
help_faq_goals_a2: Tap on the goal then 'Add Payment'. Enter the amount and it will be added to the progress bar immediately.
help_faq_investments_q1: What assets does the app support?
help_faq_investments_a1: Supports US stocks (like SPUS, VOO) and cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, and over 15 others) with live prices.
help_faq_investments_q2: How does the app calculate profit and loss?
help_faq_investments_a2: It calculates the difference between the purchase price you entered and the live current price. The result appears in dollars and as a percentage.
gamif_start: Log your first transaction to start your journey!
gamif_max_level: You are at the highest level, keep it up!
gamif_next_level_tip: Control your spending more to level up and unlock new badges 🏆

afterPayoff: After payoff, you'll save {amount} JOD monthly forever
wealthSimulatorDesc: See how your investment grows over time
compoundNote: Based on compound interest. Actual returns may vary.
fire_subtitle: Know when you'll reach financial independence
fire_increase_contrib: Increase monthly contribution to reach the goal
zakat_note: Zakat is due after one lunar year on wealth above nisab. This is an estimate — consult a scholar.
zakat_haul_note: Haul calculated from investment creation date (354 lunar days)
zakat_haul_purchase_tip: 💡 Haul date not updated? Make sure to enter the purchase date in Investments, then tap Refresh.
help_faq_investments_q3: What is the purchase date and how does it relate to Zakat?
help_faq_investments_a3: The asset purchase date is used to calculate the haul (354 lunar days) in the Zakat page. Enter it when adding an investment to get accurate alerts about when Zakat is due.
help_faq_zakat_a1: A tool that automatically calculates your Zakat based on the Islamic nisab threshold. It fetches your investments, savings goals, and debts directly from your data, and calculates Zakat on gold, silver, and cash.
help_faq_zakat_a2: The haul is calculated from the investment purchase date if available, otherwise from the date it was added to the app (354 lunar days). Red and orange alerts appear as the due date approaches.
help_faq_zakat_q3: Are gold and silver prices live?
help_faq_zakat_a3: Yes — tap 'Fetch Live Prices' in the calculator and the app will retrieve the current global gold and silver prices and automatically convert them to your currency.
help_faq_fire_a1: FIRE stands for Financial Independence, Retire Early. The calculator determines how much wealth you need to retire based on your monthly expenses and expected annual return rate.
help_faq_fire_a2: It's the annual percentage you withdraw from your wealth after retirement. The 4% rule means your wealth will last at least 25 years statistically without running out.
help_faq_fire_q3: What is the difference between Lean, Normal, and Fat modes?
help_faq_fire_a3: Lean means retiring with a frugal lifestyle (70% of your expenses), Normal means the same lifestyle you have now, and Fat means a comfortable and generous lifestyle (150% of your expenses).
help_faq_accounts_q1: How do I add a bank account?
help_faq_accounts_a1: Go to the Accounts page and tap + at the top. Choose the account type (Bank / Cash / Savings / Credit Card), enter the name and opening balance, then save.
help_faq_accounts_a2: It is your actual balance at the moment you added the account to the app. It is added only once and does not appear as a transaction — it forms the baseline for all future balance calculations.
help_faq_accounts_q3: How do I transfer money between accounts?
help_faq_accounts_a3: On the Accounts page tap 'Transfer', select the source and destination accounts, enter the amount and confirm. It is recorded as an internal transfer and does not affect your overall net balance.
help_faq_debts_q5: What is the difference between auto and manual deduction?
help_faq_debts_a5: Auto deduction: the app deducts the installment and logs an expense transaction automatically every month without any input from you. Manual: sends you a reminder on payment day to log it yourself.
help_faq_debts_q6: How do I enable auto deduction for a debt?
help_faq_debts_a6: When adding or editing a debt, enable the 'Auto Deduct' option and set the deduction day of the month. The deduction will happen automatically every month with an instant notification.
help_faq_learn_a1: Lessons are chosen based on your current financial stage (awareness, debt, emergency, investing, wealth). Every 7 days you get an Islamic lesson related to provision.
help_faq_learn_a2: Every day you complete a lesson you earn a point in your streak. Maintain the streak to get maximum benefit from learning.
help_faq_alerts_a1: AI analyzes your data daily and generates personalized alerts — warnings when you exceed 75% of income, achievements when saving, and installment reminders.
help_faq_alerts_a2: Go to Settings and enable 'Phone Notifications'. Allow the app to send notifications and you'll receive your daily alerts.
